message_retention.description: The number of days to retain events in the Event Hub.

name.description: The name of the Event Hub.

namespace_name.description: The name of the Event Hub Namespace.

partition_count.description: The number of partitions in the Event Hub.

status.description: The status of the Event Hub, e.g., 'Active' or 'Disabled'.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.
